message:
🐛 fix: audio race condition and guide row overflow (#9)

- Await player init before playback (ensures eac3 properties set)
- Use -eac3_at,-ac3_at to exclude AudioToolbox hardware decoders
- Add _ensureReady() with Completer for async init guarantee
- Fix guide programme Row overflow with mainAxisSize: min

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
